description_long: This is a wooden chair with a rounded, open-back design featuring evenly spaced vertical spindles forming the backrest and armrests. The seat is broad and slightly curved, providing a comfortable sitting area. The chair stands on four tapered legs, each angled outward for stability. The wood has a rich, dark brown finish, giving it a classic and elegant appearance. The overall construction appears sturdy, with smooth, polished surfaces and no visible upholstery or cushioning. Its design is reminiscent of Scandinavian or Windsor-style chairs, suitable for both casual and formal urban settings.
description: A dark brown wooden chair with a rounded spindle backrest and armrests, broad seat, and four tapered legs. The design is elegant, sturdy, and classic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, curved seat and the full arc of the spindle backrest and armrests.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the rounded backrest, armrest curve, and the outward angle of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the evenly spaced vertical spindles and the continuous arc of the backrest.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view emphasizing the smooth curve of the backrest and the seat's depth.
